relationships: ber:Mi d-yeffeɣ Tom seg umahil, yedda s tazzla ɣer uxxam
ber:Ziri yedda s tɣawla akken ad as-iɣer i Rima
ber:Lorenzo yedda s usferfed deg taddart-nni tamallast
ber:Sami yeffeɣ-d seg umahil yernu yedda ɣer uxxam
ber:Alberto yedda ad d-yegmer tiḥlawatin deg tlemmast n temdint
ber:Tom yedda ɣer Boston deg tgara n yimalas yezrin
ber:Sami yedda ɣer yiwet n tmesgida tadigant
ber:Kraḍ n wussan aya seg wasmi i yedda
